prestazioni: F129B 3.5L V8 (engine code) dry-sump conversion with a custom billet crankshaft from JP Performance, reinforced with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods and JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged slugs for 12.5 psi boost compatibility via a Garrett GT35R turbocharger on a custom equal-length stainless steel exhaust manifold by Capristo

Motec M190 ECU with a bespoke calibration by Ferrari specialist Autotecnica Motori, integrating a dual Bosch 0280158002 high-impedance fuel pump system and ID1000 injectors, paired with a custom air-to-water intercooler from Bell Intercoolers and a titanium intake plenum by Novitec

Ohlins TTX40 3-way adjustable coilovers with custom valving for the 355 Spider’s aluminum-intensive chassis, paired with spherical bearing upper control arms from Superformance and a 25mm front sway bar from Hotchkis, complemented by a carbon fiber front strut brace by VSR
estetica: Full carbon fiber body conversion using a 355 Spider-specific Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Pandem Design), including custom front canards, rear diffuser, and a ducktail spoiler with integrated third brake light, all finished in satin Ferrari Rosso Corsa (code 312)

Custom 3-piece BBS LM-R wheels in 18x9.5 (front) and 18x11 (rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston calipers and 380mm carbon-ceramic rotors from the Ferrari 458 Speciale

Interior reupholstered in full Alcantara (Rosso) by Sabelt, featuring custom carbon fiber door cards with integrated LED ambient lighting, a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a bespoke roll bar by Heigo, wrapped in matching Alcantara and carbon fiber
